locations.summary: 坦桑尼亚联合共和国（斯瓦希里語：Jamhuri ya Muungano wa Tanzania；英語：United Republic of Tanzania），通稱坦尚尼亞（斯瓦希里語和英語：Tanzania），是位于赤道以南的东非国家。…

relations.subject: Tanzanian red-billed hornbill
relations.evidence: It is found in central Tanzania and was discovered by Robert Glen and Sue Stolberger in Ruaha National Park All five red-billed hornbills were formerly considered conspecific
